element.description: In time for the lengthening shadows of autumn, we present a collection of fiendish options for you to playtest: new subraces for tieflings, ways to customize diabolical cults, and demonic boons that wicked NPCs can receive from the denizens of the Abyss.
element.name: Unearthed Arcana: Fiendish Options

set.description: The content from this source is not included.
set.name: information

info.name: Unearthed Arcana: Fiendish Options
